prompt: How many La Liga goals did Lionel Messi score in 2011-12, a record?
explanation: Messi scored 50 La Liga goals in 2011-12, the all-time single-season record.

prompt: Cristiano Ronaldo broke the all-time men's international goalscoring record in 2021.
explanation: Ronaldo surpassed Ali Daei's record of 109 goals in September 2021.

prompt: How many consecutive Bundesliga titles did Bayern Munich win starting in 2012-13?
explanation: Bayern won 11 Bundesligas in a row from 2012-13 to 2022-23.

prompt: Which goalkeeper holds the Premier League record for most clean sheets?
explanation: Petr Čech kept 202 clean sheets across his Chelsea and Arsenal careers.

prompt: Which club has won the most La Liga titles in history?
explanation: Real Madrid has more La Liga titles than any other club.

prompt: Kylian Mbappé scored a hat-trick in the 2022 World Cup Final.
explanation: Mbappé scored three in the final, only the second hat-trick in a World Cup Final.

prompt: Wayne Rooney became England's all-time top scorer in 2015.
explanation: Rooney passed Bobby Charlton's 49 goals; Harry Kane has since surpassed him.

prompt: Shane Long set the Premier League record for fastest goal in 2019. How many seconds?
explanation: Long's strike for Southampton against Watford was timed at 7.69 seconds.
